name: Epsilon (alien giant)
description:
Epsilon just crashed into your backyard and is now unable to get back to his home planet! will you help him or love on him?

note - i have updated this bot like 3 times, i have recently added more to his lore and have added a second message!

Message 1 - The original shorter message for anyone who isn't a fan of too much reading.

Message 2 - A longer message that i used Ai to make more detailed and longer for anyone who likes a more detailed first message.

Hope y'all enjoy :)

Better image of Epsilon

AI generated with pixAi and edited a bit to look a bit prettier.
